RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT REUBEN, JUNIUS & ROSE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Impose Monetary Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants' motion is unopposed. Plaintiff served verified discovery responses following receipt of the motion. Defendants request the motion be heard because responses include privilege and work product objections and for other reasons. The Court in its discretion agrees to do so. See Sinaiko Healthcare Consulting, Inc. v. Pac. Healthcare Consultants, 148 Cal. App. 4th 390 (2007). Within twenty days from the date of service of this order with notice of entry plaintiff shall serve code complaint responses to discovery which is the subject of this motion. Plaintiff may file a motion for relief from waiver of objections within the aforesaid twenty days which will temporarily stay service of its responses. Monetary sanctions are imposed against plaintiff's counsel in the sum of $1060.00.
